message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-8vobd approximation TSP family

Shipped in 07416f9: 7 wrappers (christofides, greedy_tsp,
simulated_annealing_tsp, threshold_accepting_tsp,
traveling_salesman_problem, asadpour_atsp, metric_closure) via
_call_networkx_approximation_for_parity helper.

Verification recorded in close_reason:
- greedy_tsp/christofides/traveling_salesman_problem match nx exactly
  on K4
- asadpour_atsp produces a valid tour on a 3-node digraph
- simulated_annealing_tsp and threshold_accepting_tsp produce valid
  cycles

Status flips from in_progress to closed; routine beads sync, no code
change.
